form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. Resuming won by a nose at Townsville Mdn March 15 over 1000m on a soft track defeating She's A Beauty carrying 60.5kg at $3.90. Second run from a spell 5th of 10 at Townsville 3yo Hcp on March 31 over 1200m, on a slow track; 2.5 len behind Burlington Arcade carrying 56.5kg at $9. Has ability and go well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Briefly inconvenienced near the 150m.
Shifted out under pressure over the concluding crowding She's A Beauty.
Over raced in the middle stages.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after three months came from midfield and won by 1.4 len at this track Bm55 March 26 over 950m in the wet defeating Rising Ruby with 56.5kg at $12. Previously second-up got back early 2nd in a small field at this track 2&3yo Hcp on November 25 over 950m, 3.5 len behind Satisfied Mugs with 55.5kg at $15. Strips fitter and is one of the leading chances.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after three months 6th of 8 at this track Bm55 on March 26 over 950m, on rain affected going; 6 len behind Threebrothers with 58kg at $8.50. Previously second-up 3rd of 7 at this track 3&4yo Hcp on October 12 over 950m, 2.5 len behind Sowilo Siren carrying 54kg at $15. May need this too.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hampered near the 100m and steadied.
Raced greenly in the early stages.
Bumped on jumping. Shifted ground under pressure in the home straight.
Made the 750m crossing awkwardly.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after three months favourite; ran on from midfield and scored a big 3 len win at this track 3yo Mdn March 26 over 950m in the wet defeating Super Steven with 60kg at $1.70. Previously second-up 2nd in a small field at Grafton Mdn on November 5 over 1000m, 3.5 len behind Prestige Pak carrying 58kg at $1.80. The one to beat based on that latest effort. Found winning form and can go on with it.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months ran last of 8 at Townsville 3yo Hcp on March 15 over 1000m, on a wet track; 9 len behind Carohvic carrying 55kg at $26. Previously second-up ran last of 12 at Doomben 2yo Mdn-Sw on June 4 over 1350m, slow going 12 len behind Sweet Pretender carrying 58kg at $71. Looks a fair way off peak form.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months eased back early on 7th of 9 at this track Bm55 on March 26 over 950m, on heavy track; 4 len behind Nordic Invader carrying 56.5kg at $7.50. Previously second-up 9th of 11 at Townsville 3yo Hcp on August 2 over 1000m, on a slow track; 9 len behind Vegameister carrying 56.5kg at $81. Rates well and can do much better this time.
